What If: Creator DNA profile from past videos
One Line Description: After 20 videos, Vivido builds your Creative DNA: cut pace, signature transitions, colour palette, weak spots
Why This Tier: Creates powerful lock-in once built. Needs video history. Ships 3-6 months post-launch when users have enough data.

What If: Creative mood setting before each session
One Line Description: Pick Energetic/Reflective/Educational/Entertaining before recording — Vivido adjusts music, captions, colour, pacing to match
Why This Tier: Low build complexity, very high first-session delight. Sets Vivido apart from every tool that treats all videos the same. Ships in Stage 1 onboarding.

What If: Last frame of video 1 = first frame of video 2
One Line Description: Your channel becomes a serialised universe — last frame locked, next episode opens on it, perfectly colour-matched
Why This Tier: Emotional, distinctive, creates channel brand identity. Ships as a Series Linking feature in the post-launch creator OS.

What If: Retention diagnosis from past 10 videos
One Line Description: AI watches your last 10 videos, tells you exactly what creative pattern is killing your retention
Why This Tier: Needs enough user history to work well. Ships after users have uploaded at least 5 videos. Powerful retention tool.

What If: Edit by mood — emotional beat map instead of timeline
One Line Description: Replace timeline with a mood map — drag the energy curve, Vivido adjusts cuts, music, colour grade
Why This Tier: Revolutionary paradigm shift — but a paradigm shift is also a learning curve. Build after core timeline is loved.

What If: Brand kit that evolves based on what performs
One Line Description: Vivido tracks which thumbnail styles and caption colours drive most watch time — suggests brand kit updates
Why This Tier: Requires sufficient performance data history. Post-launch after brand kit is established and used.

What If: A/B test two edits with real audience split
One Line Description: Publish Edit A and B to first 500 viewers each. Vivido tracks retention, auto-promotes the winner to full distribution.
Why This Tier: Game-changing for agencies and growth-focused creators. Needs publishing infrastructure to be solid first. Post-launch premium feature.

What If: Face colour consistency across shoot days
One Line Description: Subtle AI grade to match skin tone and lighting across different recording days — no mutant eyes
Why This Tier: Impressive but not a switching reason on its own. Better after core is solid and users trust the AI.

What If: Virtual cameraperson — auto-framing from fixed webcam
One Line Description: Tracks movement and gestures, keeps creator perfectly framed from a fixed webcam
Why This Tier: Solo creators have no cameraperson. This is table stakes for a modern recording tool. Riverside and Descript don't do it well.

What If: Import visual aesthetic of any film or show
One Line Description: Type Blade Runner 2049 — Vivido applies that exact colour science, grain, lens aberration to your footage
Why This Tier: Hugely popular demand from creative YouTube. Ships as a premium Cinematic Looks library post-launch.

What If: Edit your live published video in real time
One Line Description: See live drop-off chart overlaid on your timeline. Fix the 3:45 drop, publish updated version without re-uploading.
Why This Tier: Requires YouTube API-level platform partnership and dynamic video serving infrastructure. V3 vision.

What If: Undo that remembers your intention not just last action
One Line Description: Say undo the direction I was going — rolls back to before that creative idea, preserving everything else
Why This Tier: Deeply useful but technically complex — requires intent-tracking across sessions. Version history ships first, this comes next.

What If: Colour grading from a feeling description
One Line Description: Type make it feel like a 2007 film — Vivido applies a film-accurate grade reading your specific footage lighting
Why This Tier: Powerful creative feature. Ships after core grade presets are working. Natural language grade comes in the polish phase.

What If: Schedule and publish to every platform from inside editor
One Line Description: Press Publish, choose platforms, set schedule — Vivido IS the distribution layer, not just creation
Why This Tier: Without publishing, Vivido is still just an editor. This closes the loop. Non-negotiable for MSP. Ships as Stage 3 core feature.

What If: Energy detection while recording
One Line Description: AI detects if you're in the zone vs rambling — live glow indicator while recording
Why This Tier: Solves the #1 recording pain — wasted takes. Instant wow moment for new users. Drives activation.

What If: Best-take sentence compositor from 5 takes
One Line Description: AI listens to 5 takes and stitches the best delivery of each sentence into a composite master
Why This Tier: Music producers do this for vocals. No video tool has ever done it. One killer demo feature that sells Vivido instantly.

What If: Describe your video and it assembles itself
One Line Description: Type a natural language brief — Vivido assembles a first-cut from your clips automatically
Why This Tier: The holy grail but requires deep multimodal AI pipeline. Ship it when the model tech catches up. Too soon for MSP.

What If: Voice note edit tasks at timestamps
One Line Description: Leave yourself a voice note at any timestamp — add a zoom here, sound effect at boom. Tomorrow, click to execute.
Why This Tier: Low build complexity, high delight. Solves the 2am editing problem every creator has. Ships in Stage 1 as a core UX feature.

What If: AI-generated B-roll from script — no stock footage
One Line Description: I mention a busy market — Vivido generates a photorealistic 4-second clip matching my exact sentence
Why This Tier: Gen AI video quality is still not reliable enough for branded professional use. Ship in V3 when Sora-tier models are production-ready.

What If: Pre-flight score before upload
One Line Description: Hook strength, retention prediction, audio score, caption coverage, thumbnail CTR, optimal upload time — all before publish
Why This Tier: This IS the publish flow. No one has this. Ships as a Publish Readiness Dashboard — green lights across = upload. A creator ritual they will never want to lose.

What If: Delegating edits to AI with custom trust levels
One Line Description: Set per-task trust: Remove silences = Full Auto. Select best take = AI Suggests I Confirm. Colour grade = Never Auto.
Why This Tier: Solves the control vs automation tension every creator has with AI. Ships as the AI Trust Settings panel. Distinctive and practical.

What If: Remix mode — same footage, completely different cut
One Line Description: Hit Remix: High Energy 3 min — Vivido generates a different cut from the same footage instantly
Why This Tier: Exciting for power users and agencies doing multiple cuts. Better as a premium feature after core repurpose engine is stable.

What If: Edit by humming the rhythm you want
One Line Description: Hum a beat — Vivido matches your rhythm, cuts to it, syncs transitions to your hum
Why This Tier: Wildly creative but requires audio-to-edit pipeline that doesn't exist yet. Moonshot worth exploring in R&D.

What If: Presenter score and coaching over time
One Line Description: After every video: eye contact %, filler word rate, speaking pace, energy variation. Watch your score grow from 54 to 87.
Why This Tier: Incredible retention and upgrade driver. Needs multiple video history. Ships as a premium Creator Coach feature post-launch.

What If: Thumbnail prediction mid-edit
One Line Description: Mid-edit, Vivido scans footage, flags your best expression frame, generates 5 thumbnail treatments with CTR prediction
Why This Tier: Thumbnail is 50% of YouTube performance. No editing tool does this. Achievable with frame analysis + design templates. Massive differentiation.

What If: 3D VR editing — step into your edit
One Line Description: VR mode: clips float as panels, grab and move them, trim by pinching — no timeline, just space
Why This Tier: Incredible vision but requires VR hardware adoption. File under 2027+. Not an MSP concern.

What If: Publish one video in 7 languages simultaneously
One Line Description: Vivido translates transcript into 7 languages, dubs in cloned voice, publishes 7 localised versions automatically
Why This Tier: Massive for Indian creators targeting global or regional audiences. Ships as premium add-on post-launch.

What If: Think in Hindi, publish in English
One Line Description: Record rough version in Hindi naturally — Vivido transcribes, translates, teleprompter shows English — re-record globally
Why This Tier: Critical for Indian creator market. Ships as a Bilingual Recording Mode post-launch once core translation engine is stable.

What If: Video adapts to viewer attention signals
One Line Description: If viewer re-watches a section, Vivido auto-inserts simplified explanation. If they skip, a you might have missed card appears.
Why This Tier: Requires deep platform integration and real-time viewer signal API access. Not feasible at launch. V3+ vision.

What If: Dark room focus mode — total creative immersion
One Line Description: Lights off. Only footage and waveform. Keyboard-only editing. No menus. No notifications. Vivido gets out of the way.
Why This Tier: Low build complexity. High craft credibility. Signals Vivido respects serious creators. Ships as a keyboard shortcut in Stage 1.

What If: Borrow editing rhythm DNA from any YouTube video
One Line Description: Paste a YouTube URL — Vivido analyses its pacing DNA and applies cut tempo and rhythm to your footage
Why This Tier: No tool anywhere does this. It's how professional editors think — reference tracks. Viral demo feature that drives acquisition. Build as Style Presets derived from URL analysis.

What If: Subtitles that style themselves by content type
One Line Description: Punchlines = larger bold font. Disclaimers = smaller lighter. Key terms = highlighted. Typography as performance annotation.
Why This Tier: Captions are the #1 engagement feature for short-form. Smart styling ships as part of Creator Style Templates. High impact, achievable.

What If: Save creative decisions as permanent rules
One Line Description: Perfect your zoom timing once — Vivido asks Save as your Talking Head zoom rule? Applied forever after.
Why This Tier: This is how pro editors think — reusable logic not repeated effort. Ships as Creator Preferences in Stage 1. High retention driver.

What If: Video adapts per platform automatically
One Line Description: Same video — auto-adapted aspect ratio, caption style, thumbnail, music level per YouTube vs Instagram vs LinkedIn
Why This Tier: This is the repurpose engine core. Every creator needs it. Ships as the one-click multi-platform export. Non-negotiable for MSP.

What If: Context-aware endings per traffic source
One Line Description: YouTube viewers get subscribe CTA. Newsletter viewers get reply CTA. Instagram gets swipe-up. Same video body.
Why This Tier: Smart and practical. Needs distribution layer to be built first. Post-launch feature that monetises the repurpose engine.

What If: Motion graphics that respond to your energy
One Line Description: Lower thirds animate differently based on your delivery — serious point = still, excited = bounce, question = flip
Why This Tier: Stunning vision but tone-detection for motion is complex. Ships after static Creator Style Templates are loved.

What If: Gentle interventions for bad habits
One Line Description: You've said um 23 times. Your intro is 3 minutes — your top videos had intros under 90 seconds. No B-roll in 6 minutes.
Why This Tier: This is what every creator wants a co-editor to say. Ships as the AI Edit Assistant sidebar — gentle, non-intrusive, always right.

What If: Smart silence removal — keeps dramatic pauses
One Line Description: AI distinguishes dramatic pauses from dead air — removes dead air, keeps intentional beats
Why This Tier: Every single competitor silence tool is dumb. This is a direct pain point from user research. Achievable with context-aware NLP. Ships as a core AI edit feature.

What If: Redirect gaze in edit mode
One Line Description: Click a frame, AI subtly corrects your eyeline to look straight into camera — no re-record
Why This Tier: Powerful but niche use case. VEED's eye correction was hated for being buggy. Needs perfection before shipping.

What If: Series continuity tracker across episodes
One Line Description: For documentary series: tracks character introductions, recurring themes, music motifs, facts — continuity check before each episode
Why This Tier: Powerful for serialised creators. Niche but high-loyalty feature. Ships as a Series Mode in the post-launch intelligence layer.

What If: Video auto-replies to top comments with relevant clips
One Line Description: Top comment asks a question — Vivido finds the relevant clip from raw footage, auto-generates a 45s video reply
Why This Tier: Astonishing vision but fully autonomous content generation at this level needs trust and guardrails. V3+ after creator profile is mature.

What If: Conversation with your entire past video archive
One Line Description: Hey Vivido, find every time I talked about discipline — surfaces clips from all past projects, ready to compile
Why This Tier: Incredible for creators with large archives. Needs substantial user history and semantic video indexing. Post-launch.

What If: Video fully edited before you finish recording
One Line Description: As you record, Vivido edits in background. You say and thats a wrap — first draft is already done.
Why This Tier: The #1 ranked What If and Vivido's potential iPhone moment. Simultaneous production doesnt exist. Requires real-time AI pipeline. V3 north star.

What If: 45-minute creative sprint mode
One Line Description: Timer on. Streamlined interface. Only essentials. No second-guessing. 45 minutes = publishable video. Done beats perfect.
Why This Tier: Creators paralysed by perfectionism will love this. Low build complexity. Ships as a mode toggle in Stage 1. Great for social content.

What If: Script analyser before recording
One Line Description: Paste your script before recording — Vivido highlights lines that will lose viewers and suggests fixes
Why This Tier: Pre-production AI is untapped. Creators spend hours writing scripts with no feedback. This ships as a Script Health Score panel.

What If: Kinetic typography that reacts to audio performance
One Line Description: Say EXPLOSION — the word explodes outward. Whisper secret — text fades in slowly. Typography IS the performance.
Why This Tier: Viral-worthy feature for short-form creators. Ships after core animated caption system is stable.

What If: Acoustic environment simulation
One Line Description: Not just noise removal — applies full acoustic fingerprint: Home Studio, Broadcast Booth, Outdoor Clear
Why This Tier: Audio quality is the #1 creator complaint across all reviews. Ships as a preset system, not raw AI. Achievable and high-impact.

What If: Nervous habit detector and reducer
One Line Description: Detects excessive blinking, lip-licking, touching face — shows frequency chart, offers subtle reduction
Why This Tier: Fascinating but a coaching feature, not an editing feature. Belongs in post-launch presenter score system.

What If: AI chapter titles that are emotionally compelling
One Line Description: Not Chapter 1 Introduction — AI writes chapters like the day I nearly quit. Timestamps that make people click in.
Why This Tier: Easy to build on top of transcript. Massive YouTube SEO and retention impact. Every creator wants this. Ships in Stage 2.

What If: One session — 11 content pieces automatically
One Line Description: Record once: get full YouTube edit, 3 Shorts, podcast audio, LinkedIn post, Twitter thread, 2 carousels, newsletter, blog
Why This Tier: The content multiplier is the biggest practical time-saver in the product. Direct reason to pay. Ships as the Repurpose Engine flagship feature.
